text:
is a pamphlet created by All Japan Swordsmiths Association and published by Kadokawa Shoten on 12 July 2012.

Overview

Spear of Longinus, Bizen Osafune and Progressive Knife. Modern swordsmiths completely reproduce the spears and swords that appeared in Evangelion franchise. An official pamphlet for a special exhibition that combines traditional culture and animation by creating armor and short swords with Evangelion motifs.
